standort.label: Standort
standort.description:
A geographical location consisting of latitude, longitude and additional information (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be an object with the keys `lat` (latitude as decimal degrees),
`long` (longitude as decimal degrees) and `info` (additional information as a string).

For example: `{"lat": 51.313056, "long": -0.601944, "info": "Woking, Woking Borough, Surrey, England"}`.

belegungsstatus.label: Belegungsstatus
belegungsstatus.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

notizen.label: Notizen
notizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

objekt.label: Objekt
objekt.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Objekte' with the id `6a4e5573dde6bff982c5f8a6` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a4e5573dde6bff982c5f8a6/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

mangelbezeichnung.label: Mangelbezeichnung
mangelbezeichnung.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

prioritaet.label: Priorität
prioritaet.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

meldedatum.label: Meldedatum
meldedatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

zustaendige_person.label: Zuständige Person
zustaendige_person.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

kontakt.label: Kontakt (Telefon oder E-Mail)
kontakt.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

anhaenge.label: Fotos / Dokumente
anhaenge.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a4e55767e157cea183ea30a/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
